verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Have you ever talked to God above Tell Him that you need a friend to love Pray in Jesus name believing that God answer prayers.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Have you told Him all your cares & woes Every single little fear He knows Do you know He's always there And He will answer prayers.

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: You can whisper in the crowd to Him You can cry when you're alone to Him You don't have to pray out loud to Him He knows your thoughts. On a lofty mountain peak He's there In the meadow by the stream He's there Anywhere on earth you go He's been there from the start

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Find the answer in His Word is true You'll be strong because He walks with you By His faithfulness He'll see you through God answer prayers.
